case_title: CALUB, VICTORIA S. SUBWAY SANDWICHES VS NICOLAS, LYDIA S.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $548.00 FILED BY CALUB, VICTORIA S. SUBWAY SANDWICHES AS TO DEFENDANT NICOLAS, LYDIA S. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-26-1994 AT 07:00 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO LYDIA NICOLAS RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CALUB, VICTORIA S. SUBWAY SANDWICHES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NICOLAS, LYDIA S. $400.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $420.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
LETTER FROM LYDIA NICOLAS RECEIVED AND SENT TO JUDGE COLBERT.
